```
# Make lots of new builder deposits in Gloas.
# Clients should be able to handle ~200m gas worth of deposits per slot, indefinitely.
# Note it will take several slots to generate the deposits, which are done at initialization.

participants_matrix:
  el:
    - el_type: geth
      el_image: ethpandaops/geth:bal-devnet-6
      el_extra_params: ["--rpc.txfeecap=0", "--rpc.gascap=0"]
  cl:
    #- cl_type: lodestar

      cl_image: ethpandaops/prysm-beacon-chain:pre-verify-envelope-deposits
  count: 1

network_params:
  gloas_fork_epoch: 0
  withdrawal_type: "0x01"
  validator_balance: 40000
  gas_limit: 200000000
  genesis_gaslimit: 200000000

additional_services:
  - dora
  - assertoor

assertoor_params:
  image: ethpandaops/assertoor:master
  run_stability_check: false
  run_block_proposal_check: false
  tests:
    - file: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jtraglia/kurtosis-devnets/refs/heads/master/assertoor-playbooks/builder-deposits.yml"
      config:
        totalDeposits: 262144
        perSlot: 8192
        startSlot: 0 # asap

dora_params:
  image: ethpandaops/dora:master
```

[2026-05-13 18:00:26.63]  INFO params: Setting genesis validators root genesisValidatorsRoot=0x3f205f08426227952add0737c4e3591567a9fd26fca00cbbb887488944d2d80c

author: terencechain
content:
<@592004585506340885> i think we are good to go. Here is the build:
- https://github.com/ethpandaops/eth-client-docker-image-builder/actions/runs/25827911340 it will be called `glamsterdam-devnet-3-deposits`
- in your network_params, i believe you want `preset: minimal`, that was the genesis state issue for me.  This worked.. but remove cl and vl images of course:
```
participants_matrix:
  el:
    - el_type: geth
      el_image: ethpandaops/geth:bal-devnet-6
      el_extra_params: ["--rpc.txfeecap=0", "--rpc.gascap=0"]

  cl:
    - cl_type: prysm
      cl_image: gcr.io/offchainlabs/prysm/beacon-chain:latest
      vc_type: prysm
      vc_image: gcr.io/offchainlabs/prysm/validator:latest
  count: 1

network_params:
  gloas_fork_epoch: 1
  preset: minimal
  withdrawal_type: "0x01"
  validator_balance: 40000

additional_services:
  - dora
  - assertoor
  - spamoor
  - checkpointz

assertoor_params:
  image: ethpandaops/assertoor:master
  run_stability_check: false
  run_block_proposal_check: false
  tests:
    - file: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jtraglia/kurtosis-devnets/refs/heads/master/assertoor-playbooks/builder-deposits.yml"
      config:
        totalDeposits: 262144
        perSlot: 8192
        startSlot: 0 # asap

dora_params:
  image: ethpandaops/dora:master
```

author: pk910
content:
yea,  sending so many deposits via individual transactions doesn't really work reliably. some clients reject transactions when the nonce gap gets too big during parallel submission.

this uses a batching contract in between:
```
# kurtosis config snippet
assertoor_params:
  image: ethpandaops/assertoor:master
  run_stability_check: false
  run_block_proposal_check: false
  tests:
    - file: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ethpandaops/assertoor/refs/heads/master/playbooks/gloas-dev/builder-deposit-spam.yaml"
      config:
        batchSize: 200
        pendingBatches: 30 # 20*200 = 6000 deposits per block
        totalDeposits: 1000000
        skipForkActivationCheck: true # deposit before gloas activation
```

author: terencechain
content: Does it work with 200m genesis gas limit?

author: pk910
content: yea, shouldn't break anything

author: pk910
content: use with caution 😄  my computer just completely froze with a OOM cascade, running 6 geth pairs that each tried to get like 20G memory when sending 6k deposits per block 😄
